productDisplayName: Clarks Men Energise Me Leather Black Formal Shoes
description: Designed in smooth aniline leather, these Energise Me shoes from clarks have that depth and character that a stylish, classic slip-on formal shoe should have. What makes this pair even better is that it is engineered with Atsu technology that ensures your feet are offered a constant massage, keeping you energised all day long.UpperFull smooth leather upper in a slip-on style for absolute comfortComplete inner lining in leather for breathable comfortElasticated gores on the sides for easy wear and removalStitch detailing to maximise durabilityMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight comfortSoft leather footbed with Atsu technology for massaged, all-day comfortOutsoleTPU and TPR outsole with multi-directional grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves in the forefoot for flexible movementPivot point on heel for easy turning of the footCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortHorse shoe-shaped raised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustBrush using a branded leather conditioner to restore shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
